instruction: My friend is a "plugin guru" and he recommended some good plug-ins to me. Please go to the Chrome plug-in store and install all the listed plug-ins.

evaluator.eval: is_expected_installed_extensions(get_find_installed_extension_name(env, config={}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'expected': ['Zoom Chrome Extension', 'Speechify Text to Speech Voice Reader', 'React Developer Tools', 'Momentum', 'Google Translate']}}))
